title: Grenfell Tower site update March 2025
body: "In this community update, we provide information on the decision on the future of Grenfell Tower shared last month by the Deputy Prime Minister with bereaved, survivors and local residents. There is also information on the annual Tower rewrapping, site maintenance, air quality monitoring, and health and wellbeing support, plus contact details.  You can watch a recording of the update on the MHCLG YouTube channel:  Grenfell Tower site update March 2025 "
